final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Instagram-style photo of a Korean cafe aesthetic featuring coffee and desserts, shot like a smartphone photo.

Style/medium: needs a Korean cafe aesthetic with smartphone-captured photo style — exact filter and lens treatment is yours
Composition: must include coffee and desserts as focal subjects, no human figures
Subject: must include coffee beverage and dessert items arranged cafe-style
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe interior or table setting context
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, airy Instagram-worthy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, inviting cafe direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a casual smartphone-photo texture — exact grain and sharpness is yours
Text (verbatim): must include Japanese handwritten annotations with the following rules:
  - Fine hand-drawn lines like white pen strokes
  - Rough, slightly uneven one-stroke style
  - Outline lines tracing object perimeters
  - Arrows or dashed lines for visual guidance
  - Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji)
  - Short, diary-like, monologue-style comments
  - Tone: diary, single phrase, emotional attachment
  - Drink comments: taste, temperature, mood (e.g., refreshing, gentle sweetness)
  - Food comments: texture, deliciousness (e.g., moist, the best)
  - Space comments: atmosphere (e.g., relaxing, good times)
  - Overall comment: one-line summary (e.g., too happy~)
  - Decorative elements: steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoji-like marks (moderate, leave "blank space")
  - Final style: Instagram story aesthetic, magazine rough notes style, fashionable and relaxed mood
Constraints: must preserve all annotation rules above, no human figures, must maintain "blank space" aesthetic
Avoid: must avoid overcrowded composition, must avoid overly polished/professional look
